items.raw_desc:
Digitális képkeret Lexar Pexar Digital Picture Frame Black 10,1":
	

	
	
	
	The Lexar Pexar digital photo frame lets you relive your memories on a 10.1-inch display. With WiFi wireless connectivity, you can quickly and easily share photos and videos directly from your phone. The frame offers a large internal memory of 32 GB, which can be further expanded using an SD card. In addition to playing images in JPG and PNG formats, it can also handle videos. The integrated speakers take care of the sound and the additional clock and calendar functions make it a handy helper. 
    


	

	Key Features of the Lexar Pexar 10.1" Digital Photo Frame
	
	
	
		
			For displaying photos and playing videos10.1-inch display32 GB internal memoryWiFi wireless connectivity makes it easy to share contentSD memory card slot supporting up to 256 GBSupports JPG, PNG image formats and MP4, 3GP video formatsIntegrated speakers provide audio playbackAlso displays the clock and calendar

items.raw_desc: Robotgép tartozék Bosch MUZ5PP1:                Příslušenství ke kuchyňskému robotu Bosch MUZ5PP1Vytvářet domácí těstoviny nikdy nebylo tak zábavné a jednoduché. S prémiovou sadou PastaPassion ke kuchyňskému robotu Bosch MUZ5PP1 si snadno připravíte autentické italské lasagne s možností nastavení až osmi různých tlouštěk plátů a nakrájíte je na lahodné tagliatelle.
